sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107978" key="u(perxrh/matos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερχρήμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107978.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very rich,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1545.tlg001:4:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ocell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
